violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Pic informed inspector that they are presently taking a Serve Safe course and will register with RIDOH upon completion. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The door to the outside, located in the rear of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
Milk cooler gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC has taken their exam and is waiting results. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Cheese was observed thawing in the sink. PIC informed and corrected at time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Various food product were observed stored on the floor in the storage . Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
